notes: Migrate MegaBugs ticketing and mod DLL downloads to MegaWorker — a Cloudflare Worker that holds the GitHub PAT server-side. v1.10.37 baked an obfuscated PAT into the binary; v1.10.38 carries no GitHub credential at all. Each install registers an HMAC secret with the Worker on first launch and signs every write request. Anonymous reads, IP rate limits, owner-signed admin ops. Net: extracting a MegaLoad binary no longer yields any GitHub access.
